# UC-23.5.5 · Perfect Order Rate (POR) and Customer Impact

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Platform &middot; **Type:** Performance, Reliability &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We bundle arrival timing, shipment completeness, intact merchandise, and invoice-ready paperwork into one grade per outbound sale, then pair dips with shopper replies when panels respond so crews chase stories shoppers told—not guesses from spreadsheets.*

---

## Description

Splunk-ingested JDBC outbound shipments (`dbx:erp_shipments`) fuse promised clocks with delivered milestones and quantity fills; qualifying damage attributions arrive through `dbx:erp_rma` reason buckets inside a fourteen-day halo; billing completeness predicates inspect invoice postings plus batch-lot and certificate-of-analysis readiness — yielding composite Perfect Order Rate numerators where four AND pillars align; imperfect tuples classify into stacked failure modes (`LATE_ONLY`, `SHORT_SHIP_ONLY`, `DAMAGED_ONLY`, `DOCS_INCOMPLETE_ONLY`, hybrids); CX overlays join Qualtrics-style tiles (`nps_survey`, `qualtrics:response`) so detractor swings correlate with imperfect parcels rather than isolated procurement inbound OTIF chatter.

## Value

APQC cross-industry benchmarking treats ninety-percent Perfect Order Rate as top-decile while median portfolios linger near eighty percent; CFO, COO, and chief customer officers jointly steward the KPI because each imperfect storefront promise dampens promoter scores, invites pricey rework freight and reimbursement loops, surfaces churn silhouettes when ninety-day reorder silence emerges, and postpones billed invoices auditors associate with revenue-recognition scrutiny narratives rehearsed quarterly.

## Implementation

(1) Land JDBC extracts `dbx:erp_shipments`, `dbx:erp_orders`, `dbx:erp_invoices`, `dbx:erp_rma` plus HEC `hec:wms_ship` and carrier REST sourcetypes inside `index=business`; (2) publish `por_tolerance.csv` macros separating DTC zero slack from enterprise ±3-day negotiated envelopes and regulated SKU certificate gates; (3) deploy Dashboard Studio compositions coupling composite Perfect Order Rate gauges with sankey failure-taxonomy visuals and shopper-impact overlays; (4) route `DOCS_INCOMPLETE_ONLY` surges toward Revenue Assurance bridges while `DAMAGED_ONLY` bursts escalate CX remediation pods alongside Splunkbase 3549 case workflows when deployed.

## Evidence

Saved search `por_composite_weekly` plus Dashboard Studio board `BA-POR-Impact` archived monthly into governance-approved evidence folders referenced during ASCM benchmarking reviews.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- Splunk Enterprise or Splunk Cloud search tier aligned with splunkVersions below; Heavy Forwarder cluster receiving DB Connect JDBC rows from outbound staging schemas plus HTTPS modular inputs toward FedEx Track (`apis.fedex.com/track/v1/trackingnumbers`), UPS Track (`onlinetools.ups.com/api/track/v1/details`), DHL Track-and-Trace tenants under contract; HTTP Event Collector endpoints accepting Manhattan Active Warehouse Management JSON, SAP Extended Warehouse Management carton postings, Blue Yonder Labor confirmations, Qualtrics bulk CSV bridges, Medallia nightly drops, Delighted webhook payloads landing in `index=business`.
- Splunk DB Connect identities granted SELECT against curated projections merging SAP delivery headers (`LIKP`-style), delivery lines (`LIPS`-style quantities), billing bridges (`VBRK`/`VBRP` pointers), Oracle `WSH_DELIVERY_DETAILS` alongside `OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL` promise clocks, Dynamics `WMSSHIPMENT` rows, NetSuite SuiteAnalytics extracts exposing `SalesOrder`/`ItemFulfillment` keys — never SYSDBA credentials embedded inside searchable bundles.
- Revenue Operations alignment so invoice-ready documentation predicates respect ASC606 deferral calendars — Splunk paperwork gaps stay distinct from transportation punctuality so treasury reviewers trust `DOCS_INCOMPLETE_ONLY` escalations rather than parcel disputes alone.
- Customer Privacy counsel approving hashed respondent joins bridging Qualtrics cases to ERP sold-to keys via KV collections rotated quarterly — GDPR workflows documented before exposing shopper identifiers beyond CX analyst roles.

**Step 1 — Configure JDBC outbound projections, carrier REST collectors, and HEC receivers**

Provision Splunk DB Connect rising-column polls (`cron_schedule = 0 */4 * * *` typical) writing sourcetypes `dbx:erp_shipments`, `dbx:erp_orders`, `dbx:erp_invoices`, and `dbx:erp_rma` into `index=business`. Name identity stanzas `[db://hana/rs_outbound_por]` selecting delivery identifiers (`VBELN AS oid`), requested delivery dates (`RDD` lifted from SAP schedule lines inside SQL), actual goods-issue timestamps, carrier SCAC, promised versus delivered quantities, customer segment tags (`CUSTOMER_SEGMENT`), trade-lane hints (`TRADE_LANE`), invoice readiness flags projected from billing blocks — emit `_time` from last operational confirmation inside SQL so Splunk timelines track dock truth rather than indexer arrival.

Parallel Oracle JDBC lane `[oracle://corp/rs_wsh_outbound]` binds `DELIVERY_ID`, `REQUEST_DATE`, `ACTUAL_SHIP_DATE`, `ACTUAL_ARRIVAL_DATE`, `ORGANIZATION_ID`, `SHIP_METHOD_CODE`, promise landmarks from commerce holds when storefront teams maintain them.

Stand up Heavy Forwarder modular inputs performing OAuth client_credentials POST flows toward FedEx Production credentials, UPS bearer tokens, DHL XML or JSON pulls — map responses into sourcetypes `fedex:tracking`, `ups:tracking`, `dhl:tracking` retaining raw exception codes (`SERVICE_TYPE`, `DELIVERY_EXCEPTION`) so SPL later distinguishes shopper-approved delays versus operational misses.

Land WMS carton-close streams via HEC sourcetype `hec:wms_ship` capturing pallet identifiers, ASN stamps, cross-dock handoffs — essential when ERP postings lag forklift scans overnight.

Optional Splunk Add-on for Salesforce (Splunkbase 3549) inputs reading Case, Survey, or custom return objects when CRM hosts damage narratives absent from JDBC extracts — OAuth profiles must match governance records Finance approved.

Document firewall tickets covering outbound TLS toward carrier APIs plus inbound HEC from WMS clusters — attach change IDs auditors review quarterly.

**Step 2 — Build the composite KPI search**

**Perfect Order Rate** equals perfect orders divided by eligible orders where perfection demands simultaneous on-time arrival, in-full quantity, damage-free outcomes tied to curated RMA reason buckets, plus documentation completeness — multiply four booleans before rolling up failure taxonomies.

Start from `dbx:erp_shipments` — coalesce storefront order numbers, SAP `VBELN`, Oracle `DELIVERY_ID`, Dynamics `SALESID` strings into `oid`; deduplicate JDBC retries per delivery yet preserve load-plan identifiers when planners award one trophy per consolidated tractor load.

Derive tolerance `tol_days` via case expressions blending DTC zero slack, SMB two diary days, enterprise three, seven for international lanes — externalize literals through `por_tolerance.csv` keyed by `(CUSTOMER_SEGMENT,TRADE_LANE)` when contracts demand bespoke buffers.

Blend carrier proof timestamps from fedex:tracking or ups:tracking subsearches keyed on `TRACKING_NUMBER` when ERP clocks stall during customs — coalesce ERP `POD_TIMESTAMP` with parcel `STATUS_TIMESTAMP` using precedence rules Operations publishes per lane recipe.

Left join dbx:erp_rma isolating damage-like reason buckets (`damage_in_transit`, `wrong_product`, `quality_defect`) — convert claim open times to epoch seconds, compare against delivered milestones plus fourteen-day windows using integer arithmetic (`delivered_epoch + 1209600`) to skirt ambiguous midnight boundaries.

Join Qualtrics nps_survey or qualtrics:response rows on hashed oid ties — compute rolling average NPS overlays after classification; suppress blended commentary when cohort counts fall beneath CX floors.

Materialize failure_category mappings (`LATE_ONLY`, `SHORT_SHIP_ONLY`, `DAMAGED_ONLY`, `DOCS_INCOMPLETE_ONLY`, hybrid tuples) feeding Sankey-ready aggregates dashboard teams pivot downstream.

Publish saved search `por_composite_weekly` cadence aligned with SIOP rituals — optionally summary-index outputs if analysts demand decade-long pacing without replaying raw JDBC floods.

**Step 3 — Validate tuples against ERP, carrier portals, shopper research**

SAP validation: sample Splunk imperfect tuples, trace deliveries inside VL03n comparing goods-movement timestamps to Splunk epochs, inspect billing logs (`VF03`) verifying invoice statuses mirrored inside JDBC pulls — reconcile `_indextime - _time` skew under twelve hours.

Carrier validation: compare REST payloads with FedEx Ship Manager or UPS Quantum View using identical tracking digits — escalate HTTP 429 storms before blaming warehouses.

CX validation: Qualtrics Response IDs inside Splunk must match Insight dashboards weighted averages — duplication implies overlapping nightly CSV imports.

Oracle validation: Fusion Ship Confirm workbook timestamps against JDBC extracts — daylight-saving mismatches introduce phantom tardiness unless SQL emits timezone-aware timestamps.

Executive reconciliation: CFO-ready Perfect Order decks referencing APQC ninety-percent benchmarks must align within two percentage points — investigate JDBC watermark stalls whenever Splunk percentages drift from finance spreadsheets referencing identical warehouses.

**Step 4 — Operationalize dashboards, accountability bridges, escalation etiquette**

Dashboard Studio layouts follow visualization guidance — lattice heatmap comparing REGION versus CUSTOMER_SEGMENT perfect ratios; ranked splunk.table enumerating worst oid tuples with failure badges; radial gauge plotting thirty-day composite versus ninety-percent corridor; dual-axis line overlay trending nightly composites versus Procurement-published seasonal tolerance bands ahead of Cyber Weeks.

Directed sankey consumes failure taxonomy aggregates — truncate slices below two percent for readability yet footnote downloadable CSV companions retain suppressed buckets.

PagerDuty bridges fire only after jdbc_watermark_health searches prove freshness — Ops refuses midnight escalations triggered purely by stalled JDBC identities.

CX bridges reopen Medallia hero campaigns whenever DAMAGED_ONLY bursts coincide with statistically meaningful detractor climbs — Revenue Assurance coordinates DOCS_INCOMPLETE_ONLY spikes with interim accrual narratives treasury annotates manually.

Archive PNG snapshots monthly alongside hashed respondent manifests proving GDPR-compliant storytelling — Legal attaches artefacts to Splunk Evidence packs cited during ASCM benchmarking decks leadership delivers externally.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting imperfect outbound telemetry**

- Cross-border parcel clocks sometimes sprint four-to-twelve hours ahead of warehouse carton milestones near bonded hubs — blend authoritative timestamps via macros weighing ERP versus parcel proofs per lane cookbook Ops revises quarterly.

- Fixed fourteen-day damage halos anchored solely on ticketing clocks orphan bruises adjudicated sixteen diary hours beyond Splunk horizons — augment SPL with attachment timestamps Service Cloud exposes once Salesforce extracts stream through Splunkbase 3549.

- Sequential tractor splits across one shopper commitment duplicate JDBC rows — collapse using load-plan dedup macros before denominators inflate.

- Vendor drop-ship lanes omit outbound ASNs for large fractions of SKUs — mark tuples DATA_INCOMPLETE rather than punitive tardiness when third-party parcel accounts never handshake tracking digits.

- Buy-online-pickup-in-store journeys lack parcel legs — substitute associate pickup confirmations from hec:wms_ship payloads when fulfillment_type=BOPIS.

- Care-approved postponements captured only on voice transcripts while ERP promises stay stale — enrich Splunk with CRM delay approvals or accept benign tardiness noise.

- Signature-required reroutes annotate feeds with detention codes resembling misses — translate carrier exception dictionaries before punctuality predicates fire.

- Refurbishment returns may reopen legacy delivery identifiers — keep lineage hashes separating refurbished stock keeping units so composite math never subtracts perfection twice.

- Peak parcel grids lengthen advertised service spans while tolerance macros remain zero — adopt seasonal overlays keyed off logistics advisories without rewriting historic baseline histories silently.

- Ocean consolidations map one master bill of lading to many orders — augment joins with cargo-manifest children when PO-level proofs disappear inside forwarder portals.

- Experience-panel participation slipping beneath thirty percent weakens detractor correlations printed beside imperfect tuples — annotate dashboards with statistical guardrails CX leadership mandates.

- Shared-blame damage investigations finalize slowly — stage mediation lookup tables Splunk consumes once investigators publish culpability weeks after ticketing closes.

- Quarter-end treasury accrual freezes may withhold invoice identifiers despite carton completeness — cross-check documentation alerts against provisional deferral queues (`FARR_D_*`, `ACDOCA` holds) before paging logistics for paperwork finance already recognizes under alternate narratives.


## SPL

```spl
index=business sourcetype="dbx:erp_shipments" earliest=-90d@d
| eval oid=tostring(trim(coalesce(order_id,SALES_ORDER_NO,VBELN,DELIVERY_ID)))
| dedup oid sortby - _time
| eval qty_ord=tonumber(coalesce(QTY_ORDERED,ORDER_QTY,"0"))
| eval qty_del=tonumber(coalesce(QTY_DELIVERED,DELIVERED_QTY,"0"))
| eval promised_epoch=coalesce(strptime(PROMISED_DELIVERY,"%Y-%m-%d"),strptime(RDD,"%m/%d/%Y"),strptime(RDD,"%Y-%m-%d"))
| eval delivered_epoch=coalesce(strptime(coalesce(CARRIER_DELIVERED_TS,POD_TIMESTAMP),"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3Q"),strptime(coalesce(CARRIER_DELIVERED_TS,POD_TIMESTAMP),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),strptime(ACTUAL_DELIVERY_DT,"%Y-%m-%d"),strptime(POD_DATE,"%m/%d/%Y"),strptime(POD_DATE,"%Y-%m-%d"))
| eval tol_days=case(CUSTOMER_SEGMENT="DTC",0,CUSTOMER_SEGMENT="SMB_B2B",2,CUSTOMER_SEGMENT="ENT_B2B",3,match(TRADE_LANE,"intl|cross_border"),7,3)
| eval lateness_days=if(isnull(delivered_epoch),null(),round((delivered_epoch-promised_epoch)/86400,4))
| eval on_time=if(isnull(delivered_epoch),0,if(lateness_days<=tol_days,1,0))
| eval in_full=if(qty_ord<=0 OR qty_del>=qty_ord*0.95,1,0)
| eval docs_complete=if(match(INVOICE_STATUS,"posted|cleared") AND coalesce(BATCH_LOT_OK,"Y")="Y" AND coalesce(COA_OK_IF_REQ,"Y")="Y",1,0)
| join type=left max=200000 oid [| search index=business sourcetype="dbx:erp_rma" earliest=-120d@d | eval oid=tostring(trim(coalesce(order_id,SALES_DOC_NO))) | eval qual=if(match(lower(REASON_BUCKET),"damage_in_transit|wrong_product|quality_defect"),1,0) | where qual=1 | eval rma_epoch=coalesce(strptime(RMA_CREATED_TS,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),strptime(RMA_CREATED_TS,"%Y-%m-%d"),_time) | stats min(rma_epoch) as first_qual_rma by oid ]
| eval dmg_end=if(isnull(delivered_epoch),null(),delivered_epoch + 1209600)
| eval qual_damage=if(isnull(first_qual_rma),0,if(first_qual_rma>=delivered_epoch AND first_qual_rma<=dmg_end,1,0))
| eval damage_free=if(qual_damage=1,0,1)
| eval perfect=if(on_time=1 AND in_full=1 AND damage_free=1 AND docs_complete=1,1,0)
| eval failure_category=case(perfect=1,"PERFECT",on_time=0 AND in_full=1 AND damage_free=1 AND docs_complete=1,"LATE_ONLY",on_time=1 AND in_full=0 AND damage_free=1 AND docs_complete=1,"SHORT_SHIP_ONLY",on_time=1 AND in_full=1 AND damage_free=0 AND docs_complete=1,"DAMAGED_ONLY",on_time=1 AND in_full=1 AND damage_free=1 AND docs_complete=0,"DOCS_INCOMPLETE_ONLY",on_time=0 AND in_full=0 AND damage_free=1 AND docs_complete=1,"LATE_AND_SHORT",on_time=0 AND in_full=1 AND damage_free=0 AND docs_complete=1,"LATE_AND_DAMAGED",on_time=0 AND in_full=0 AND damage_free=0 AND docs_complete=1,"MULTI_BREAK",1=1,"OTHER_MIX")
| join type=left max=200000 oid [| search index=business (sourcetype="nps_survey" OR sourcetype="qualtrics:response") earliest=-120d@d | eval oid=tostring(trim(coalesce(related_order_id,ORDER_REF,SALES_ORDER_REF))) | stats latest(NPS_SCORE) as survey_nps latest(CSAT_SCORE) as survey_csat by oid ]
| stats count as orders sum(perfect) as perfect_orders avg(survey_nps) as avg_nps avg(survey_csat) as avg_csat by REGION CUSTOMER_SEGMENT failure_category
| eval por_pct=round(100*perfect_orders/nullif(orders,0),2)
| sort failure_category REGION
| table REGION CUSTOMER_SEGMENT failure_category orders perfect_orders por_pct avg_nps avg_csat
```

## Visualization

Dashboard Studio lattice: categorical heatmap plotting Perfect Order Rate by REGION × CUSTOMER_SEGMENT; ranked splunk.table exposing worst-performing `oid` tuples with failure badges; radial gauge comparing rolling thirty-day composite Perfect Order Rate versus ninety-percent enterprise guardrail; dual-axis line chart trending nightly composite Perfect Order Rate versus Procurement-published seasonal tolerance overlays; directed sankey (`splunk.sankey`) illustrating volumetric transitions among failure_category buckets emitted from SPL aggregates.

## Known False Positives

Merchant storefront countdown edits shorten shopper-visible arrival timers without rewriting JDBC promised landmarks sourced hours earlier — Splunk punctuality misreads shopper-approved slack after kiosk banners refreshed overnight. Consolidator steamship manifests stitch unrelated purchaser commitments beneath one vessel identifier — parcel proofs satisfy maritime milestones yet disguise which storefront pledge slipped once drums unload amid unrelated receipts staged shifts apart. Reverse-logistics refurbishment credits resurrect fulfillment tuples previously stamped fulfilled — dormant identifiers collide unless lineage surrogate keys fingerprint refurbishment waves distinctly from maiden voyages. Boutique replenishment cohorts skew dormant-buyer churn proxies whenever ninety-day silence reflects negotiated annual replenishment pauses—not abandonment inferred blindly absent contractual clauses. Parcel gateways spanning datelines stamp midday arrivals while dock scanners register dusk carton closes twelve diary hours earlier — tardiness horns sound despite pragmatic dock adherence reconciled manually inside transportation bridges weekly. Sequential tractor appointments splitting pallets duplicate denominators whenever JDBC emits two trailer rows though storefront charters insist singular trophy scoring aligned with consolidated manifests planners circulate privately. Curbside showroom pickups omit courier milestones entirely — tardiness predicates treating absent mileage proofs like interstate misses malign associates honoring verbal pickup pledges shoppers applaud though timestamps remain invisible inside parcel consoles altogether. Signature detention narratives annotate carrier timestamps Splunk punctuality treats like blemishes irrespective of courteous shopper-approved postponements negotiated verbally beyond ticketing hierarchies surfaced digitally overnight. Treasury interim accrual freezes withhold invoicing identifiers despite carton completeness milestones logistics satisfied punctually — documentation predicates referencing ERP invoices alone mis-flag immaculate shipments whenever accountants deliberate ASC606 narratives unrelated to dock throughput excellence nightly ops reviews emphasize confidently despite CFO dashboards highlighting provisional deferrals auditors reconcile afterward collaboratively.
